PowerShell($content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\("C:\\Users\\logan\\Projects\\Claudious\\projects\\pc-optimization\\arcraiders\\Deploy-ArcRaidersConfig.ps1"\); $idx = $content.IndexOf\('$header = @"'\); Write-Host "Position of '`$header = @`"': $idx"; $slice = $content.Substring\($idx, 200\); Write-Host "--- Bytes starting at here-string opener ---"; $bytes = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes\($slice\); for \($i = 0; $i -lt 50; $i++\) { $b = $bytes[$i]; $c = if \($b -ge 32 -and $b -lt 127\) { [char]$b } else { '.' }; Write-Host \("[{0,3}] 0x{1:X2} \({1,3}\) '{2}'" -f $i, $b, $c\) })

PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Users\\logan\\Projects\\Claudious\\projects\\pc-optimization\\arcraiders\\Deploy-ArcRaidersConfig.ps1"\); "First 3 bytes: $\($bytes[0]\) $\($bytes[1]\) $\($bytes[2]\)"; if \($bytes[0] -eq 0xEF -and $bytes[1] -eq 0xBB -and $bytes[2] -eq 0xBF\) { "HAS UTF-8 BOM" } else { "NO BOM" }; $text = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\("C:\\Users\\logan\\Projects\\Claudious\\projects\\pc-optimization\\arcraiders\\Deploy-ArcRaidersConfig.ps1"\); $nonAscii = $text.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { [int]$_ -gt 127 } | Group-Object | Select-Object Name, Count; $nonAscii | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String)
